# Nono - No Overhead, Neural Operations

Unified AI-powered framework for executing tasks using Generative AI with multi-provider support.

## Context

Nono is a modular Python framework that provides a unified interface for interacting with multiple LLM providers (Google Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Perplexity, DeepSeek, Grok, Groq, Cerebras, NVIDIA, Hugging Face, OpenRouter, Azure AI, Vercel, Ollama). It enables task-based execution with JSON prompt definitions, code generation, batch data processing, and structured outputs with schema validation.

Primary goals:
- Provider-agnostic AI interactions
- Reusable task definitions via JSON/Jinja2 templates
- Token-efficient batch processing
- Secure code generation and execution
- Enterprise-ready with SSL flexibility and rate limiting

## Tech Stack

| Component | Technology | Version |
|-----------|------------|---------|
| Language | Python | >= 3.11 |
| AI SDK (Google) | google-generativeai | >= 0.8.0 |
| AI SDK (OpenAI) | openai | >= 1.0.0 |
| HTTP Client | requests | >= 2.28.0 |
| Validation | pydantic | >= 2.0.0 |
| Templates | jinja2 | >= 3.0.0 |
| TOML Parser | tomli/tomllib | built-in 3.11+ |
| Build System | hatchling | latest |

## Project Structure

```
Nono/
├── nono/                       # Main package
│   ├── cli.py                  # Command-line interface
│   ├── config.py               # Unified configuration management
│   ├── config.toml             # Default configuration file
│   │
│   ├── connector/              # Low-level AI provider connectors
│   │   ├── connector_genai.py  # Multi-provider client (Gemini, OpenAI, etc.)
│   │   ├── structured_output.py # Structured output parsers, validation & retry
│   │   ├── mcp_client.py       # MCP client (connect external MCP servers as tools)
│   │   ├── api_manager.py      # API key management with keyring
│   │   └── genai_batch_processing.py  # Batch processing utilities
│   │
│   ├── tasker/                 # Task execution framework
│   │   ├── genai_tasker.py     # TaskExecutor class
│   │   ├── jinja_prompt_builder.py  # Jinja2 template integration
│   │   ├── prompts/            # JSON task definitions
│   │   └── templates/          # Jinja2 prompt templates
│   │
│   ├── executer/               # Code generation & execution
│   │   ├── genai_executer.py   # CodeExecuter with security controls
│   │   └── config.json         # Execution configuration
│   │
│   ├── hooks.py                # Lifecycle hooks engine (Pre/PostToolUse, etc.)
│   │
│   ├── agent/                  # AI agent framework (NAA)
│   │   ├── compaction.py       # Auto-compaction strategies (LLM summarisation, token-aware)
│   │   ├── execution.py        # Agent execution model (task packets, state machine, policies, checkpoints)
│   │   ├── tool.py             # FunctionTool, ToolContext, @tool decorator
│   │   ├── agent_card.py       # A2A Agent Card protocol (discovery metadata, /.well-known/agent-card.json)
│   │   ├── tasker_tool.py      # Bridge TaskExecutor tasks as agent tools
│   │   ├── tools/              # Built-in ready-to-use tools
│   │   │   ├── datetime_tools.py  # Date, time, timezone utilities
│   │   │   ├── text_tools.py      # Text analysis and manipulation
│   │   │   ├── web_tools.py       # HTTP fetch and URL checking
│   │   │   ├── python_tools.py    # Math evaluation, code execution
│   │   │   └── shortfx_tools.py   # ShortFx integration (3,000+ formulas)
│   │   ├── workspace.py         # Workspace — declarative I/O description (FileEntry, URLEntry, InlineEntry, CloudStorageEntry, TemplateEntry, OutputEntry)
│   │   └── skills/             # Built-in reusable AI skills
│   │
│   ├── sandbox/                # External sandbox execution
│   │   ├── base.py             # BaseSandboxClient, SandboxProvider, SandboxRunConfig, SandboxResult
│   │   ├── manifest.py         # Manifest, LocalDir, S3Bucket, GCSBucket, AzureBlob, CloudflareR2
│   │   ├── sandbox_agent.py    # SandboxAgent, get_sandbox_client()
│   │   ├── harness.py          # SandboxSnapshot, SnapshotStore, HarnessRuntime (harness/compute separation)
│   │   ├── durable_agent.py    # DurableSandboxAgent (auto-retry + rehydration)
│   │   └── clients/            # Provider clients
│   │       ├── e2b.py          # E2B cloud sandbox (e2b-code-interpreter)
│   │       ├── modal.py        # Modal serverless containers (modal)
│   │       ├── daytona.py      # Daytona dev environments (daytona-sdk)
│   │       ├── blaxel.py       # Blaxel cloud sandboxes (blaxel)
│   │       ├── cloudflare.py   # Cloudflare Workers containers (cloudflare)
│   │       ├── runloop.py      # Runloop dev-boxes (runloop-api-client)
│   │       └── vercel.py       # Vercel sandboxes (httpx)
│   │
│   └── examples/               # Usage examples
│       ├── cli_example.py
│       └── config_example.py
│
├── pyproject.toml              # Project metadata and dependencies
├── main.py                     # Entry point
└── README.md                   # Main documentation
```

## Configuration

### Priority Resolution (highest to lowest)

1. **CLI Arguments** - `--provider gemini --model gpt-4o`
2. **Environment Variables** - `NONO_GOOGLE__DEFAULT_MODEL`
3. **Config File** - `config.toml` or custom file
4. **Default Values** - Programmatic defaults

### Key Environment Variables

```bash
# Provider configuration (use __ for nested keys)
NONO_GOOGLE__DEFAULT_MODEL="gemini-3-flash-preview"
NONO_RATE_LIMITS__DELAY_BETWEEN_REQUESTS="0.5"

# Path configuration (legacy API)
NONO_TEMPLATES_DIR="/path/to/templates"
NONO_PROMPTS_DIR="/path/to/prompts"
NONO_CONFIG_FILE="/path/to/config.toml"

# API Keys
GOOGLE_API_KEY="your-key"
OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key"
```

### config.toml Structure

```toml
[google]
default_model = "gemini-3-flash-preview"

[openai]
default_model = "gpt-4o-mini"

[ollama]
host = "http://localhost:11434"
default_model = "llama3"

[rate_limits]
delay_between_requests = 0.5

[paths]
templates_dir = ""
prompts_dir = ""
```

## CLI Interface

### Entry Point

```bash
python -m nono.cli [options]
```

### Main Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `--provider`, `-p` | AI provider: gemini, openai, perplexity, deepseek, grok, ollama |
| `--model`, `-m` | Model name (uses provider default if omitted) |
| `--prompt` | Direct prompt text |
| `--task`, `-t` | Task name or JSON file path |
| `--input`, `-i` | Input file |
| `--output`, `-o` | Output file |
| `--dry-run` | Simulate without API calls |
| `--verbose`, `-v` | Increase verbosity (-v=INFO, -vv=DEBUG) |
| `@params.txt` | Load arguments from file |

### Examples

```bash
# Direct prompt execution
python -m nono.cli --provider gemini --prompt "Explain Python decorators"

# Task-based execution
python -m nono.cli --provider openai --task summarize -i document.txt -o summary.json

# Dry-run mode
python -m nono.cli --dry-run --provider gemini --prompt "Test" -v

# Parameters from file
python -m nono.cli @production_params.txt
```

## Functions & Public API

### Config Module (`nono.config`)

```python
from nono.config import Config, load_config, ConfigSchema

# Quick load
config = load_config(filepath='config.toml', env_prefix='NONO_')

# Method chaining
config = Config(defaults={'timeout': 30}).load_file('config.toml').load_env('NONO_')

# Access values
model = config['google.default_model']
delay = config.get('rate_limits.delay', type=float)

# Validation
schema = ConfigSchema()
schema.add_field('google.default_model', required=True)
config.validate()

# Legacy API
from nono.config import NonoConfig, get_templates_dir, set_prompts_dir
```

### CLI Module (`nono.cli`)

```python
from nono.cli import (
    CLIBase, create_cli,
    print_success, print_error, print_warning, print_info,
    print_table, print_progress, print_summary, confirm_action
)

# Factory function
cli = create_cli(prog="tool", version="1.0.0", with_provider=True)
cli.add_examples(["%(prog)s --provider gemini --prompt 'Hello'"])
args = cli.parse_args()

# Statistics tracking
cli.increment_stat('processed', 100)
cli.print_final_summary()
```

### Connector Module (`nono.connector`)

```python
from nono.connector import GeminiService, OpenAIService, OllamaService

# Initialize client
client = GeminiService(model_name="gemini-3-flash-preview")

# Generate completion
response = client.generate_completion(
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}],
    temperature=0.7,
    max_tokens=4096
)

# SSL configuration
from nono.connector import configure_ssl_verification, SSLVerificationMode
configure_ssl_verification(SSLVerificationMode.CERTIFI)
```

### Structured Output (`nono.connector.structured_output`)

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel
from nono.connector import (
    StructuredGenerator, PydanticOutputParser, JsonOutputParser,
    RegexOutputParser, CsvOutputParser, ParseError, MaxRetriesExceededError,
    parse_json, parse_pydantic, parse_csv,
)

# Pydantic model validation with retry
class Sentiment(BaseModel):
    label: str
    score: float

gen = StructuredGenerator(service, model=Sentiment, max_retries=2)
result = gen.generate([{"role": "user", "content": "Analyze sentiment."}])
# result is a Sentiment instance

# Agent-level integration
from nono.agent import Agent
agent = Agent(
    name="classifier", instruction="Classify text.",
    output_model=Sentiment, output_retries=3,
)

# Convenience one-shot parsing
data = parse_json('{"key": "value"}')
sentiment = parse_pydantic('{"label": "positive", "score": 0.9}', Sentiment)
rows = parse_csv("name,age\nAlice,30")
```

### Auto-Compaction (`nono.agent.compaction`)

```python
from nono.agent import (
    Agent, SummarizationStrategy, TokenAwareStrategy,
    CallableStrategy, CompactionResult, CompactionStrategy,
)

# Enable LLM-based compaction (uses agent's own service)
agent = Agent(name="assistant", instruction="Help me.", compaction=True)

# Custom strategy
agent = Agent(
    name="assistant",
    compaction=SummarizationStrategy(
        trigger_ratio=0.75,     # fire at 75% of max_loop_messages
        keep_recent=6,          # keep 6 most recent messages verbatim
        summary_max_tokens=500,
    ),
)

# Token-aware variant
agent = Agent(
    name="assistant",
    compaction=TokenAwareStrategy(
        max_context_tokens=100_000,
        trigger_ratio=0.75,
    ),
)

# Default (compaction=None) uses _prune_messages sliding window
agent = Agent(name="assistant", instruction="Help me.")

# Plain function (auto-wrapped in CallableStrategy)
def my_compactor(messages, max_messages):
    return [messages[0]] + messages[-(max_messages - 1):]

agent = Agent(name="assistant", compaction=my_compactor)

# External strategy via import path (plugin / config-driven)
agent = Agent(name="assistant", compaction="mypackage.compaction.MyStrategy")
```

### Token-Level Streaming (`nono.connector`, `nono.agent`, `nono.server`)

Native token-by-token streaming for 11+ providers via `generate_completion_stream()`.

```python
from nono.agent import Agent, Runner

agent = Agent(name="writer", model="gemini-3-flash-preview", instruction="Write a story.")
runner = Runner(agent)

# Token-level streaming
for event in runner.stream_text(user_input="Tell me a tale"):
    if event.type.value == "text_chunk":
        print(event.data["chunk"], end="", flush=True)
```

SSE endpoint: `POST /agent/{name}/stream/text`

Streaming tool calls: `StreamChunk` with `type="tool_call"` yields incremental function-call arguments via `TOOL_CALL_CHUNK` events. Native support for OpenAI-compatible providers + Cerebras.

### Agent Execution Model (`nono.agent.execution`)

```python
from nono.agent import (
    TaskPacket, EscalationPolicy, ReportingContract,
    WorkerStateMachine, WorkerState,
    FailureClassifier, FailureCategory, RecoveryRecipe,
    PolicyEngine, PolicyRule, PolicyResult, CallablePolicy,
    AutoMergePolicy, StaleBranchPolicy, StartupRecoveryPolicy,
    LaneCompletionPolicy, DegradedModePolicy,
    VerificationContract, VerificationLevel, VerificationResult,
    WorktreeManager, WorktreeInfo,
    StaleBranchDetector, BranchStatus,
    ConversationCheckpointManager, ConversationCheckpoint,
    PlanModeAgent, PlanResult,
)

# Typed task packets
packet = TaskPacket(
    objective="Fix login timeout bug",
    scope=["src/auth/"],
    acceptance_tests=["pytest tests/test_auth.py"],
)
data = packet.to_json()
restored = TaskPacket.from_json(data)

# Worker state machine (thread-safe, 8 states)
sm = WorkerStateMachine()
sm.transition(WorkerState.RUNNING)
sm.transition(WorkerState.FINISHED)

# Failure classifier (10 categories + recovery recipes)
classifier = FailureClassifier()
result = classifier.classify(Exception("rate limit exceeded"))
print(result.category, result.recipe)

# Policy engine (5 built-in + custom + callable + from_config)
engine = PolicyEngine.default()
engine.register_callable("custom", lambda ctx: PolicyResult(triggered=False), priority=10)
engine.disable("auto_merge")
results = engine.evaluate({"tests_pass": True})
config = engine.to_config()

# Verification contract (4 levels)
contract = VerificationContract()
contract.verify_up_to(VerificationLevel.MODULE_GREEN)

# Worktree isolation
mgr = WorktreeManager(repo_root="/repo")
info = mgr.create(branch="fix/123", path="/tmp/wt")

# Stale-branch detection
detector = StaleBranchDetector(repo_root="/repo")
status = detector.check("feature/old", reference="main")

# Conversation checkpoints
cpm = ConversationCheckpointManager()
cpm.save("session-1", events=[], state={}, messages=[])

# Plan mode (read-only exploration)
planner = PlanModeAgent(agent)
plan = planner.plan("How to refactor auth?")
```

### MCP Client (`nono.connector.mcp_client`)

```python
from nono.connector.mcp_client import MCPClient, mcp_tools
from nono.agent import Agent, Runner

# Connect to stdio MCP server
client = MCPClient.stdio("uvx", args=["mcp-server-filesystem", "/tmp"])
tools = client.get_tools()

# Or use convenience function
tools = mcp_tools(command="uvx", args=["mcp-server-filesystem", "/tmp"])

# Attach to an agent
agent = Agent(name="assistant", instruction="Help with files.", tools=tools)
result = Runner(agent).run("List files in /tmp")
```

### Dynamic Agent Factory (`nono.agent.agent_factory`)

```python
from nono.agent import AgentFactory, create_agent_from_prompt
from nono.agent.tool import tool

@tool(description="Search the web.")
def web_search(query: str) -> str: ...

# One-liner (requires agent.factory.allow_dynamic_creation = true)
agent = create_agent_from_prompt(
    "A research agent that searches the web and summarises findings.",
    available_tools=[web_search],
)

# Full control — blueprint review before build
factory = AgentFactory()
blueprint = factory.generate_blueprint(
    "An agent that analyses CSV data.",
    available_tools=[csv_reader],
)
print(blueprint.to_dict())  # inspect
agent = factory.build(blueprint, available_tools=[csv_reader])

# Orchestrated multi-agent — factory picks the best pattern
from nono.agent import OrchestrationBlueprint

orch_bp = factory.generate_orchestrated_blueprint(
    "Research a topic, then write an article, then review it.",
    available_tools=[web_search],
)
print(orch_bp.pattern)             # e.g. 'sequential'
print(orch_bp.sub_agent_blueprints) # inspect sub-agents
agent = factory.build_orchestrated(orch_bp, available_tools=[web_search])

# Human-in-the-loop review
agent = create_agent_from_prompt(
    "A data analyst agent.",
    review_callback=lambda bp: input(f"Approve {bp.name}? (y/n) ") == "y",
)

# Register a custom orchestration pattern
from nono.agent import register_pattern, OrchestrationRegistry

def my_factory(*, name, description, sub_agents, provider, model, pattern_kwargs):
    from my_module import MyCustomAgent
    return MyCustomAgent(sub_agents=sub_agents, name=name, description=description)

register_pattern(
    key="my_custom",
    class_name="MyCustomAgent",
    description="My domain-specific orchestration",
    keyword_hints=["custom", "special workflow"],
    factory=my_factory,
    min_sub_agents=2,
)

# The pattern is now available to AgentFactory and OrchestrationSelector
print(OrchestrationRegistry.list_patterns())  # includes "my_custom"
```

### Agent State Management (`nono.agent.base`)

```python
from nono.agent import Session, InvocationContext, Agent, Runner

# Session with initial state and optional persistent memory
session = Session(
    session_id="conv-42",
    state={"lang": "es"},
    memory=kim_instance,  # optional KeepInMind
    max_events=500,       # 0 = unlimited
)

# Thread-safe state access (required inside ParallelAgent)
session.state_set("counter", 0)
session.state_update({"a": 1, "b": 2})
val = session.state_get("counter", default=0)

# Two content scopes
session.shared_content.save("report", "Visible to all agents")  # session-wide
agent.local_content.save("scratch", "Private to this agent")    # per-agent

# SharedContent limits: 200 items (LRU), 10 MB per item

# State isolation — new Session for full independence
isolated = Session()
ctx = InvocationContext(session=isolated, user_message="Independent task")
response = sub_agent.run(ctx)

# InvocationContext: MAX_TRANSFER_DEPTH = 10 (anti-loop guard)
```

### State Introspection (`nono.workflows`, `nono.agent`, `nono.tracing`)

```python
# Workflow: real-time streaming
for step_name, state in flow.stream():
    print(step_name, state)

# Workflow: post-execution audit trail
for t in flow.transitions:
    print(t.step, t.keys_changed, t.duration_ms)

# Workflow: time-travel to any past step
state_at = flow.get_state_at("clean")

# Workflow: full execution history
history = flow.get_history()  # [(step, state), ...]

# Workflow: replay with overrides
result = flow.replay_from("fetch", rows=200)

# Workflow: graph introspection
flow.steps       # ['fetch', 'clean', 'analyze']
flow.describe()  # text summary of edges and branches
flow.draw()      # ASCII diagram

# Workflow: checkpoints
flow.list_checkpoints()       # [(index, step_name), ...]
flow.get_checkpoint_at("a")   # state dict from disk

# Agent: event streaming
for event in runner.stream("Hello"):
    print(event.event_type, event.content)

# Agent: post-execution events and state
runner.session.events      # list[Event]
runner.session.last_event  # Event | None
runner.session.state       # dict

# Tracing: structured observability
from nono.tracing import TraceCollector
collector = TraceCollector()
runner = Runner(agent, trace_collector=collector)
runner.run("Hello")
collector.traces           # list[Trace]
collector.total_tokens     # int
collector.total_llm_calls  # int
collector.export()         # list[dict] (serializable)
collector.print_summary()  # human-readable output
```

### REST API Introspection (`nono.server`)

```python
# Workflow: run with introspection (POST /workflow/{name})
# Request: {"state": {...}, "introspect": true}
# Response includes: transitions[], state_history[], graph, ascii_diagram

# Workflow: describe graph without executing (GET /workflow/{name}/describe)
# Response: steps[], graph, ascii_diagram, schema

# Agent: run with introspection (POST /agent/{name})
# Request: {"message": "...", "introspect": true}
# Response includes: events[], state, event_count

# Agent: stream events in real-time (POST /agent/{name}/stream)
# SSE: data: {"agent": "...", "type": "...", "content": "...", "timestamp": "..."}

# Combine both flags for maximum observability:
# {"state": {...}, "trace": true, "introspect": true}
```

### Tasker Module (`nono.tasker`)

```python
from nono.tasker import TaskExecutor, build_from_file_blocks

# Task execution
executor = TaskExecutor(provider="gemini")
result = executor.execute_task(
    task_name="name_classifier",
    input_data={"name": "María García"}
)

# Template-based prompts
prompts = build_from_file_blocks(
    "data_loss_prevention.j2",
    text="John Smith, SSN: 123-45-6789",
    compliance="GDPR"
)
```

### Hooks Module (`nono.hooks`)

```python
from nono.hooks import HookManager, HookEvent, Hook, HookType, HookContext, HookResult, discover_hooks, load_agent_scoped_hooks

# Create a hook manager
manager = HookManager()

# Register a Python callable hook
def on_pre_tool(ctx: HookContext) -> HookResult:
    if ctx.tool_name == "dangerous_tool":
        return HookResult(block=True, block_reason="Tool blocked by policy")
    return HookResult()

manager.register(HookEvent.PRE_TOOL_USE, Hook(fn=on_pre_tool))

# Register a GenAI prompt hook
manager.register(HookEvent.POST_TOOL_USE, Hook(
    prompt="Validate output: {tool_response}",
    provider="google", model="gemini-3-flash-preview",
))

# Register a task hook (loads prompts/review_output.json)
manager.register(HookEvent.POST_TOOL_USE, Hook(task="review_output"))

# Register a skill hook
manager.register(HookEvent.POST_AGENT_RUN, Hook(skill="summarize_skill"))

# Register a tool hook
manager.register(HookEvent.PRE_TOOL_USE, Hook(
    tool="audit_logger", tool_args={"action": "call", "target": "{tool_name}"},
))

# Load hooks from JSON config (supports all 6 types)
manager.load_config({
    "hooks": {
        "PostToolUse": [
            {"type": "command", "command": "echo tool done", "matcher": "Write|Edit"},
            {"type": "prompt", "prompt": "Summarize: {tool_response}"},
            {"type": "task", "task": "review_output"},
            {"type": "skill", "skill": "summarize_skill"},
            {"type": "tool", "tool": "log_action", "tool_args": {"msg": "{tool_name}"}}
        ]
    }
})

# Load from file
manager.load_file(".github/hooks/format.json")

# Auto-discover hooks from .github/hooks/, .claude/, ~/.copilot/hooks/, etc.
manager = discover_hooks("/path/to/workspace")

# Load agent-scoped hooks from .agent.md frontmatter
agent_hooks = load_agent_scoped_hooks(".github/agents/formatter.agent.md")

# Attach to an agent
from nono.agent import Agent
agent = Agent(
    name="helper", model="gemini-3-flash-preview", provider="google",
    instruction="You are helpful.", hook_manager=manager,
)
```

### Executer Module (`nono.executer`)

```python
from nono.executer import CodeExecuter

executer = CodeExecuter()
result = executer.run("Calculate factorial of 10")
print(result.output)  # 3628800
print(result.code)    # Generated Python code
```

## Development Workflow

### Installation

```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/DatamanEdge/Nono.git
cd Nono

# Create virtual environment
python -m venv .venv
.venv\Scripts\activate  # Windows
source .venv/bin/activate  # Linux/Mac

# Install dependencies
pip install -e .

# For Python < 3.11, install TOML parser
pip install tomli
```

### Running

```bash
# CLI execution
python -m nono.cli --help

# Run examples
python -m nono.examples.cli_example
python -m nono.examples.config_example
```

### Testing

```bash
# Run tests (when available)
pytest tests/

# Type checking
mypy nono/
```

## Technical Rules & Conventions

### Code Style
- **PEP 8** compliant
- **Type hints** on all public functions
- **Google Docstrings** format
- English for code, Spanish for user documentation

### Architecture Patterns
- **SOLID principles** throughout
- **Abstract base classes** for providers (`BaseAIClient`, `BaseService`)
- **Factory pattern** for CLI and config creation
- **Method chaining** for fluent APIs
- **Instance-based design** for testability (not singletons)

### Naming Conventions
- `snake_case` for functions, variables, modules
- `PascalCase` for classes
- `UPPER_CASE` for constants
- Prefix private methods with `_`

### Error Handling
- Return `(success: bool, errors: List[str])` tuples for validation
- Use `ValueError` for configuration errors
- Log with `logging` module using `msg_log()` or `@event_log` decorator

### File Organization
- JSON task definitions in `tasker/prompts/`
- Jinja2 templates in `tasker/templates/`
- Examples in `examples/`
- Documentation as `README_*.md` in module directories

## Key Endpoints/Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `nono/cli.py` | Main CLI entry point and utilities |
| `nono/config.py` | Unified configuration management |
| `nono/connector/connector_genai.py` | Multi-provider AI client |
| `nono/connector/mcp_client.py` | MCP client — bridge external MCP servers into Nono tools |
| `nono/hooks.py` | Lifecycle hooks engine — 6 types: function, command, prompt, task, skill, tool |
| `nono/README_skills.md` | Skills documentation — creation tutorial, tool propagation, dynamic discovery |
| `nono/agent/agent_factory.py` | Dynamic agent generation from natural language |
| `nono/agent/execution.py` | Agent execution model — task packets, state machine, policies, verification, worktree, checkpoints, plan mode |
| `nono/agent/templates/pipelines.py` | 29 multi-agent pipelines across 7 domains (dev, architecture, ops, data, AI/ML, content, security) |
| `nono/tasker/genai_tasker.py` | Task execution framework |
| `nono/executer/genai_executer.py` | Code generation and execution |
| `nono/config.toml` | Default configuration |
| `nono/tasker/templates/*.j2` | Prompt templates (DLP, spell correction, etc.) |
| `nono/tasker/prompts/*.json` | Task definitions |

## Supported AI Providers

| Provider | Environment Key | Default Model |
|----------|-----------------|---------------|
| Google Gemini | `GOOGLE_API_KEY` | gemini-3-flash-preview |
| OpenAI | `OPENAI_API_KEY` | gpt-4o-mini |
| Perplexity | `PERPLEXITY_API_KEY` | sonar |
| DeepSeek | `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` | deepseek-chat |
| Grok (xAI) | `GROK_API_KEY` | grok-1 |
| Ollama | (local) | llama3 |

---

*Generated for LLM context. See README.md for full documentation.*
